02 //

Projects

Design Thinking

🛡️ Campus Safety App

Designed a smart campus safety application that enables students and staff to instantly locate the nearest first aid kit on campus using a real-time interactive map. The app also features a one-tap emergency call system to connect directly with the healthcare department, drastically reducing response time during medical emergencies on campus.

UX Design Healthcare Tech Campus Safety Real-time Mapping
Applied Chemistry

🌱 Biodegradable Seed Balls for Dryland Restoration

Developing an eco-friendly solution to combat desertification in Solapur, where annual rainfall is only 500–700mm concentrated in 3–4 months, leaving soils nutrient-depleted for 7–8 months. The project involves engineering biodegradable seed balls packed with native seeds, organic compost, and moisture-retaining agents — designed to survive dry seasons and germinate naturally when rains return, restoring native vegetation without human intervention.

Sustainability Biodegradable Materials Dryland Restoration Solapur Ecology
